quick_skim.title: Adaptive Sampling for Minimum-Norm $k$-Clustering
quick_skim.abstract: In $k$-clustering problems, we are given a metric space $(\mathcal{C}, d)$, and must choose a set $S$ of $k$ centers to open. Each client $j \in \mathcal{C}$ incurs an assignment cost, which is the distance between $j$ and center in $S$ that it has been assigned to. In this work, we study the \emph{minimum-norm $k$-clustering problem}, where we are given an arbitrary monotone symmetric norm $f$, and wish to open $k$ centers so as to minimize $f$(assignment-cost vector). This is a powerful generalization, encompassing many classical $k$-clustering problems including the $k$-median, $k$-means, and $k$-center problems.   A simple and efficient algorithmic idea is that of \emph{adaptive sampling}, wherein we randomly choose the location of the next center to open with probability proportional to its ``cost" under the currently chosen set. While this has yielded fast algorithms for some $k$-clustering problem, little is known for settings \emph{without} ``min-sum" objectives.   We devise the first adaptive-sampling-based bicriteria constant-factor approximation algorithm for general minimum-norm $k$-clustering, vastly expanding the scope of problems handled by adaptive sampling. For the special case of $\text{Top}_\ell$ norms, which form a building block of monotone symmetric norms, we show that adaptive sampling yields an $O(\log k)$-approximation algorithm.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adaptive sampling for k-clustering, similar to query strategy in active clustering
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: k聚类的自适应采样，类似于主动聚类中的查询策略
quick_skim.llm_evidence: k聚类的自适应采样，类似于主动聚类中的查询策略
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: k聚类的自适应采样，类似于主动聚类中的查询策略
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an adaptive sampling algorithm for minimum-norm k-clustering that serves as a query strategy, bridging to active clustering methods.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究最小范数k聚类问题，提出一种自适应采样算法来依次选择聚类中心。该方法在每一步根据当前分配成本随机采样下一个中心，与主动学习中的查询策略思想类似。虽然论文未明确涉及主动学习或大语言模型，但其自适应采样策略为主动聚类方法提供了理论工具。理论分析表明该算法在多种范数下具有近似保证。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文研究最小范数k聚类问题，提出一种自适应采样算法来依次选择聚类中心。该方法在每一步根据当前分配成本随机采样下一个中心，与主动学习中的查询策略思想类似。虽然论文未明确涉及主动学习或大语言模型，但其自适应采样策略为主动聚类方法提供了理论工具。理论分析表明该算法在多种范数下具有近似保证。
